creator: mdg583@hotmail.com
text:
I have a line in my fstab like this:
/dev/ntfs/STUFF /usr/home/matt/stuff    ntfs-3g rw,late,noauto  0       0
And when mounted, the device is like this:
/dev/fuse0 on /usr/home/matt/stuff (fusefs, local, synchronous)

If I launch hald when this device is mounted, hald fails with the following error verbose console output:

..
